varlistentry.term: Member AB_LoadDataWrapper (dfref tmpDFR, string expFilePath, string datafolderPath, string listOfNames, variable typeFlags=defaultValue)

listitem.para: this is not 100% correct as users might choose a different name for the unpacked experiment folder

varlistentry.term: Member AB_LoadSweepsFromNWB (string discLocation, string dataFolder, string device)

listitem.para: : Update this function for the use with SweepTable

varlistentry.term: Member AB_StoreChannelsBySweep (variable groupID, variable nwbVersion, string channelList, WaveInteger sweeps, WaveText storage)

listitem.para: Update this function for the use with SweepTable
extend these with PRE_SET_EVENT and POST_SET_EVENT once this is reworked, see https://github.com/AllenInstitute/MIES/issues/658 and https://github.com/AllenInstitute/MIES/issues/39.
IP9: Unify with BUG

varlistentry.term: Member CalculateTPLikePropsFromSweep (wave numericalValues, wave textualValues, wave sweep, wave deltaI, wave deltaV, wave resistance)

listitem.para: unify with TP_Delta code
add support for evaluating "inserted TP" only
rework the code to have a fixed popValue
display correct values for yoked devices

varlistentry.term: Member DC_CalculateChannelColumnNo (string device, string setName, variable channelNo, variable channelType)

listitem.para: this code here is different compared to what RA_BckgTPwithCallToRACounterMD and RA_CounterMD do
how to handle yoked devices??
merge with GetAllObjects once IP9 is mandatory as then VariableList and StringList are threadsafe
change to return a 0/1 wave with constant size a la DAG_GetChannelState
make this a generic cursor getter function and merge with cursors() in
move the renaming stuff into one function for all four labnotebook waves
is not very accurate as we should store the yoking dependencies in a permanent way instead of hoping that ListOfFollowerITC1600s is accurate
remove and use background struct members for the deviceID and GetDeviceMapping instead
IP9 make it threadsafe
change to return a 0/1 wave with constant size a la DAG_GetChannelState
this should be removed as it does not belong into this function
Needs HDF5 XOP support for reading link targets use HDF5LinkInfo
Allow Executions for files with missing SweepTable entry using LoadSweepNumber

varlistentry.term: Member LOG_AddEntry_TS (string package, string action, string caller, WaveText keys=defaultValue, WaveText values=defaultValue)

listitem.para: IP9-only: merge with LOG_AddEntry
IP9-only: Remove precision specifier
TPbackground can crash while operating pressure regulators if called in the middle of a TP. Need to call P_Pressure control from TP functions that occur between TPs to prevent this from happening
this hack must go away.

varlistentry.term: Member MSQ_GetLBNEntryForHeadstageSCI (wave numericalValues, variable sweepNo, variable type, string str, variable headstage)

listitem.para: merge with LBN functions once these are reworked.

varlistentry.term: Member MSQ_GetLBNEntryForHSSCIBool (wave numericalValues, variable sweepNo, variable type, string str, variable headstage)

listitem.para: merge with LBN functions once these are reworked.
: IP8 convert all call sites to use MultiThread/T=

varlistentry.term: Member NWB_FetchEpochs (wave numericalValues, WaveTextOrNull textualValues, variable sweep, variable channelNumber, variable channelType)

listitem.para: we don't yet write epoch info into the LBN
Needs to be reworked for specific controls and allow the value to be directly passed in with an optional parameter
this hack must go away.

varlistentry.term: Member SetControlTitleColor (string win, string controlName, variable R, variable G, variable B)

listitem.para: store color in control user data, check for color change before applying change
If user switched headStage mode while pressure regulation is ongoing, pressure reg either needs to be turned off, or steady state slope values need to be used
Enable mode switching with TP running (auto stop TP, switch mode, auto startTP)
Enable headstate switching with TP running (auto stop TP, change headStage state, auto start TP)

varlistentry.term: Member SF_FormulaPlotter (string graph, string formula, dfref dfr=defaultValue, variable dmMode=defaultValue)

listitem.para: Removes dimension labels in COLS and LAYERS
Removes dimension labels in COLS and LAYERS
